name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Locking Contract
purpose: Define future lock scopes and staging requirements for safe Builder publish execution.

timeout_policy.default: Use explicit finite lock timeouts with heartbeat or owner verification before recovery.
timeout_policy.expired_lock_handling: Do not assume an expired lock is safe; verify process state and audit recovery.

failure_policy.lock_acquisition_failed: Stop publish before staging or runtime writes.
failure_policy.staging_failed: Stop before runtime writes and retain or cleanup staging artifacts according to retention policy.
failure_policy.runtime_write_failed: Use pre-created rollback manifest and backups for a human-reviewed recovery path.

agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may explain lock requirements.
AI Builder Agent must not acquire publish locks until a future explicit implementation permits human-controlled publish execution.
